notes: Pure reorganization B-milestone over the M2-complete repo. Reorganized clerkenstein into library-named dirs (authn/colony-authn, clerk-backend/clerk-sdk-go-v2 = bapi+orgclient merged, clerk-frontend/clerk-js+nextjs, clerk-webhook/svix) + shared/ (universal-key JWT, mint↔verify split) + alignment/ harness + a self-contained knowledge/ base + CLAUDE.md + singularity-manifest.md + gitignored .agentspace/. 69 history-preserving git-mv renames; no mock-behavior change — both alignment gates (Go 22/22, JS 9/9) + the drift harness (9/9) stayed green throughout. Close review: 0 scope gaps; 1 should-fix code-quality (stale fuzz-test comment naming pre-reorg packages, fixed) + 2 doc findings (coverage-index count drift 112->113, fixed; state.md Headline refresh, done). Adversarial: the shared/ extraction seam is the only new surface — already pinned by the harden-pass cross-boundary test. Decision triage: D1/D2/D4 already blended into the repo's knowledge/ during the build; D3/D5/D6/D7/D8 archived (maintainer/process-only). S4 (run /singularity-kit:repo-consolidate code) is a documented USER finalize of a disable-model-invocation skill — NOT a deferral. clerkenstein close fixes committed on its own main (ad87545). Code lives in gitignored anthropos-demo/clerkenstein. LAST milestone of v1.0 -> next is /developer-kit:close-release.
